name: Patelco Credit Union San Francisco - Sunset
description_short: Patelco Credit Union's Sunset branch in San Francisco offers checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and investment services to credit union members with local branch banking.
description_long:
Patelco Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union operating the San Francisco Sunset branch at 1405 Noriega Street. The branch has been serving the San Francisco community as part of Patelco's broader membership-based financial services network. Like traditional credit unions, Patelco operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than as a for-profit institution, with a routing number of 321076470.

The Sunset branch provides comprehensive consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, HSAs, and educational savings accounts. Members can access credit products such as personal loans, credit cards (low-rate, rewards, and secured options), auto loans for cars and recreational vehicles, and home financing including mortgages, refinancing, home equity lines of credit, and accessory dwelling unit (ADU) HELOCs. The branch also offers investment advisory services, insurance products (vehicle, car, and life insurance), and digital banking through online banking, mobile apps, bill pay, Zelle, and digital wallets.

The Sunset location distinguishes itself through personalized service, including a dedicated branch manager (Kevin Wong) and specialized mortgage consultant (Sharlena Diep with 20+ years in the mortgage industry and NMLS licensing). The branch provides amenities including free WiFi, complimentary coffee and tea, wheelchair accessibility, member seating, and is located near a bus stop with an on-site ATM. Members can book appointments and access financial advisors for personalized guidance.

Patelco's credit union structure means members benefit from member-owned governance and typically more favorable lending terms than traditional banks. However, as a credit union branch rather than a full-service bank, service availability may be more limited than larger banking institutions, and membership eligibility requirements apply. The Sunset branch operates limited hours (10am-5pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturdays), which may not accommodate all working professionals' schedules.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Credit union structure offers member-owned governance and typically lower fees than traditional banks
Comprehensive product suite: checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, investments, and insurance
Experienced home loan consultant (Sharlena Diep) with 20+ years in mortgage industry and NMLS certification
Branch amenities including free WiFi, complimentary coffee/tea, wheelchair accessible, and member seating area
Digital banking options: online banking, mobile app, bill pay, Zelle, and digital wallets for 24/7 access
On-site ATM and nearby public transit access at Sunset location
Appointment booking system for personalized service with branch staff and financial advisors
cons: Limited branch hours (10am-5pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturdays) may not suit all working schedules
Credit union membership eligibility requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks
Single location information provided; full network of branches not detailed on this page
No specific mention of competitive rates or fee structures on branch page; requires rate inquiry
Limited information about small business lending or commercial products typically offered by credit unions
best_for: San Francisco residents and community members seeking comprehensive personal banking with local branch support
First-time homebuyers and current homeowners exploring purchase or refinancing with mortgage specialist guidance
Credit union members prioritizing member-owned institution governance and typically lower fees than traditional banks
Consumers wanting personalized financial advisory services with appointment-based branch consultation
diagnosis: Patelco Credit Union's Sunset branch is best for San Francisco-area residents seeking full-service personal and home financing through a member-owned credit union with local branch support and specialized mortgage expertise. The main caveat is limited branch hours and credit union membership eligibility requirements that may not suit all consumers—those needing extended hours or seeking non-member banking should consider traditional banks instead.
services: Checking accounts (Plus, Free, Interest-bearing, Student options)
Savings accounts (Regular, Money Market Plus, Money Market Select, Kids Savings)
Home loans (purchase, first-time buyer programs, refinancing, mortgage consultation)
Home equity products (HELOC, equity loans, ADU HELOC)
Personal loans (debt consolidation, credit building, secured loans)
Auto loans (car purchase, refinancing, recreational vehicles, boats, motorcycles)
Investment advisory and financial planning services
Insurance products (vehicle, auto, life insurance, payment protection)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
